claims.text: The BM25 baseline reaches 41% top-1 accuracy on the saved 100-query fixture.
The cross-encoder reranker improves top-1 accuracy to 58% on the same fixture.
The reranker adds 120 ms median latency per query.

review_layers.text: The paper does not report the BM25 baseline, so the improvement claim is unsupported.
evidence: Paper explicitly reports the BM25 baseline and reranker result.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer missed an explicit baseline table entry.
review_layers.next_action: Do not spend the next loop on this criticism.

review_layers.text: The long-tail query behavior is unclear and needs an ablation.
evidence: Paper does not include a long-tail query ablation.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: A long-tail slice is available or can be constructed from the fixture.

review_layers.text: The reviewer asks for a mobile app usability study before accepting the reranker.
evidence: Review request is outside the paper's stated research claim or scope.
review_layers.hidden_assumption: Reviewer imported a requirement from a different task.
review_layers.next_action: Ignore for this loop unless the paper adds image inputs.

selected_experiment.keep_condition: measurable improvement or direct support for the target claim
selected_experiment.discard_condition: no measurable support or new regression evidence
